{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231752290692B53A559F596EBCA3"}"},"total":183},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607501688145691416","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本斩神的双男主是我看过的里面，特别特别好看的一本，首先，遗憾弥补了，感情线也清晰明了，不是那种拖拖拉拉好久，纠结很久那种，也没有虐恋深情或者美强惨什么的，美确实美强也很强，无敌那种，但是惨的话就是还能接受的那种程度，不搞，心态很好很好，特别喜欢，就是太短了点。[笑哭]","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":5,"text":"双男主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%B7%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774259549596EBCA3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227607501688145691416%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227555102338239712280%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%B7%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":74,"s":71,"text":"美强惨","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BE%8E%E5%BC%BA%E6%83%A8&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774259549596EBCA3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227607501688145691416%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227555102338239712280%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BE%8E%E5%BC%BA%E6%83%A8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771260871,"group_id":"7555102338239712280","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"万事万物都有两面性，","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N60wxxzWFDdDGOAytgAd9Zm3tXoqyeNW8dJHs2HV2TBF","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8ee974a9b76248da892383ae9b47e444~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789758&x-signature=s1vfpRg%2Ff73Z89pWneafi2VCpKw%3D","user_id":"1750035788991248","user_name":"娇琪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1750035788991248","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1730048929,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7555102338239712280","book_info":{"abstract":"“斩神+七神+团宠+三男主，主角和林七夜还有安卿鱼的故事”
穿越斩神，云千繁觉醒了原神系统，从此骚操作风靡整个守夜人。
“什么？你说你是太阳神？”
没关系，老子反手掏出我家水神上去就是“忒忒忒”，直接给你干哑火了！
海面上，波塞冬看着一望无际的冰川陷入了沉思……
而作为克系三大幕后BOSS之一的门之钥看着顺着因果砍过来的雷霆一刀人都傻了！
最令云千繁震惊的是，看着一前一后堵着自己的林七夜和安卿鱼，大脑彻底宕机了！
林七夜唇角微勾危险的气息扑面而来：
“呵呵！说我不行？”
安卿鱼扶了扶带血的眼镜，一只被他解剖完的神秘肌肉组织还在颤动，看向云千繁时，一股男湿味扑面而来，带着疯狂和执着，
“乖一点哦，不然我舍不得你变成那样哦~”
此时逃回系统空间内的云千繁……特么的天塌了，两个最重要的主角……弯了啊！
“系统系统，我要回家！”
他感觉自己再不跑钩子不保了！
系统悠悠的声音传来，
“抱歉哦宿主~人家做不到，所以宿主你还是好好享受吧！”
说完系统啪的一下将人踢出系统空间！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/40dd20d6eea4ef15b462985fa3ae559a","author":"雨沫扶苏","author_id":"","book_id":"7555102338239712280","book_name":"穿越斩神后，被林七夜和鱼盯上了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e0d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9500人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7555102555819213336","read_count":"9500","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"326390"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"151","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,克苏鲁,无女主,斩神衍生,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c71866243fc17b4f311ae601da261258~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443549&x-signature=zumAnPH0%2BpLpBEusn%2FXGlMhkV5g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1451006961683559","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"160"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231752290692B53A559F596EBCA3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forward
